title: Opioid medication review documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

medication.text: Supports functional pain assessment, complex pain or pain-service review, discharge communication, and clinician-arranged follow-up without autonomous treatment.
medication.rationale: Supports functional pain assessment and pain-service review context for opioid medication review documentation; no decision is generated.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports functional pain assessment, complex pain or pain-service review, discharge communication, and clinician-arranged follow-up without autonomous treatment.

referral.text: Supports documenting chronic pain, opioid use, medicine history, psychosocial context, alcohol or illicit substance context, function, and specialist involvement.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Opioid, formulation and dose, duration, indication, effect, adverse effects, function, misuse risk, monitoring, taper discussion and prescriber plan are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for opioid medication review documentation.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
